== Notes for [[Item:Q88105|Q88105]] ==

RESEARCH NOTES:
Princess of Macedonia; children: Antiochis of Syria
- - Andromachos of Syria
- - Laodice I Queen of Syria
- - Alexandros of Syria

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01161.htm#0

1 NAME the Perdiccid //
2 GIVN the Perdiccid
2 SURN
2 NICK the Perdiccid


1 NAME NN. of /Macedonia/

1 NAME the Perdiccid //
2 GIVN the Perdiccid
2 SURN
2 NICK the Perdiccid


1 NAME NN. of /Macedonia/

1 NAME the Perdiccid //
2 GIVN the Perdiccid
2 SURN
2 NICK the Perdiccid


1 NAME NN. of /Macedonia/

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
